description: Composition Blue square neck t-shirt made of 100% 180GSM cotton, with short cap sleeves elasticated at the hem and laced and pleated neck   Fitting Regular Wash Care Machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring dry Dry in shade Medium iron, but do not iron on print Don the boho chic look in a really cool way with this trendy t-shirt from Jealous 21.
